name: FPV Car with Phone Controller
description: Browser-based Controller for an FPV RC car with Live video feed,steering, speed and customizable settings.
overview: An ESP32-focused FPV RC platform concept that uses a web interface as the control surface. The project hub is prepared for the Instructables guide, source files, wiring notes, control UI, and demo access.
steps: Review the build guide and parts list.
Upload the controller firmware to the ESP32 hardware.
Connect to the car network or configured access point.
Open the browser control page on a phone or laptop.
Test steering, throttle, brake, and camera workflow before driving.
